identity.mission: Create a defense-grade, mission-critical marketplace that radiates authority, precision, and trust. No generic SaaS aesthetics.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Military HUD' precision with 'Swiss' typographic hierarchy.
Emotion First: The user should feel secure, empowered, and focused.
Content is King: Data densities must be high but legible. Every pixel counts.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to frame content, not just white space.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in 'low light' conditions (simulated).

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and data values.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, labels, and long-form text.

mono.usage: Use for codes, serial numbers, and technical specs.

borders.special: Use 'tracing beam' effects on active cards.

grid.landing: Grid Mode A (Tetris): Asymmetrical layouts for visual interest.
grid.dashboard: Grid Mode B (High Density): Strict data grids, 100% height utilization.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous padding (py-24) for landing sections, tight (p-4) for dashboard widgets.

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm hover:bg-accent-hover hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,206,209,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-accent/50 text-accent hover:bg-accent/10 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider

inputs.style: bg-background border-border/50 rounded-sm focus:border-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

implementation_steps: Install dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge
Configure Tailwind: Add Barlow Condensed and Inter fonts, define 'accent' colors.
Global CSS: Set body background to #050505 and text to white. Add '.dark' class by default.
Create UI Components: Customize Shadcn components to remove rounded-xl and use rounded-sm.
Develop Homepage: Implement Hero, Categories (Horizontal Scroll), Suppliers, Featured Product.
Develop Inner Pages: Category Detail, Product Detail, Supplier Profile.
Auth & Forms: Implement Registration with multi-step form.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles (sharp, uppercase for this persona).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
